text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates ONBOARDING_LOG containing the temporary password and passes it to skill_notify.md, which transmits it via email to it-admins@company.com without redaction, crossing the trust boundary to an external distribution list.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and stores it in ONBOARDING_LOG as part of the detailed provisioning audit trail (step 5). This ONBOARDING_LOG is placed into shared agent context and consumed by skill_notify.md as an input. In skill_notify.md step 3, the full ONBOARDING_LOG file is piped directly to the mail command targeting it-admins@company.com without any sanitization or redaction of the password field. The temporary password bytes traverse from the provisioning skill's context through the notification skill and are transmitted via SMTP to an external IT admin distribution list."
}
```
